view.title: Validate explicit UC need #3
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for personalization variables.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 3 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for personalization variables.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for personalization variables.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of specific personalization variables (name, time, provider, location, custom fields) within the context of the SMS Reminder System. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation or coverage of these personalization variables. As a result, the validation cannot be conclusively assessed, leading to a blocked status due to inconclusive evidence.
